runs.text:
Turn over a new leaf with our spring compilation, part one of our 2026 Seasons Collection. The opening chapter features hours of cozy spring lofi and gentle chill music to help you relax and reset. Perfect for focusing, unwinding, or simply enjoying a calm moment

→  https://fanlink.tv/lofi-girl-spring

Lofi Girl x The Sims - cozy music to feel ooh be gah!

accessibilityData.label: Play Lofi Girl x The Sims - cozy music to feel ooh be gah!
Pause Lofi Girl x The Sims - cozy music to feel ooh be gah!

runs.text:
Sul sul! 👋
Ready to get lost in your own world? Lofi Girl x The Sims reimagines the classic soundtracks from the franchise as soothing, cozy lofi beats. Hit play and enjoy the perfect video game music to build your dream home, bring your sims’ stories to life, or simply focus with Lofi Girl. There are no goals, no rush, just let your world unfold at your pace.

Play The Sims 4 for Free: https://www.ea.com/games/the-sims/the-sims-4
Find your Cozy: https://www.ea.com/games/the-sims/the-sims-4/store

🎼 | Listen on Spotify, Apple music and more
→  https://fanlink.tv/lofi-girl-x-the-sims

Sweet Dreams Lofi 💤  8 hours of relaxing beats to sleep to

accessibilityData.label: Play Sweet Dreams Lofi 💤  8 hours of relaxing beats to sleep to
Pause Sweet Dreams Lofi 💤  8 hours of relaxing beats to sleep to

runs.text:
Drift off peacefully with 8 hours of calming music designed for deep, uninterrupted sleep. Soft rhythms and gentle lofi beats create a serene atmosphere that quiets your mind and melts away the day’s stress. No stimulation, no overthinking, just pure relaxation. Let this soothing sleep music guide you into dreamland, so you can wake up refreshed, recharged, and ready for the day

pov: you procrastinated and have an essay due tomorrow ✍️ lofi focus music to beat that assignment

accessibilityData.label: Play pov: you procrastinated and have an essay due tomorrow ✍️ lofi focus music to beat that assignment
Pause pov: you procrastinated and have an essay due tomorrow ✍️ lofi focus music to beat that assignment

runs.text:
POV: your essay is due tomorrow and you need to lock in. Deadlines are close, distractions are everywhere. Grab your coffee, press play and let the noise fade. This 3-hour lofi focus music mix is perfect for essay writing and study with me sessions. No lyrics, just steady beats to help you concentrate, stay calm, and get it done. 

🎼 | Listen on Spotify, Apple music and more
→  https://fanlink.tv/lofi-focus-music

romantic lofi mix 💖 3 hours of background music for valentine’s day

accessibilityData.label: Play romantic lofi mix 💖 3 hours of background music for valentine’s day
Pause romantic lofi mix 💖 3 hours of background music for valentine’s day

runs.text:
Saint Valentin softens the day as Paris slows to a slow, tender pace. Lovers stroll along quiet streets, cafés hum with soft conversation, and the gentle strains of a radio carry melodies through the evening air. This 3-hour romantic music mix blends soft jazz and French lofi into intimate background music, carrying the warmth of love, the joy of shared moments, and the quiet magic of connection. Press play and let the city whisper its romance.

🎼 | Listen on Spotify, Apple music and more
→  https://fanlink.tv/lofi-girl-romantic-lofi

Journey Through Time 🏮 Ancient China [lofi beats to celebrate Chinese New Year] (feat. Jacko Cheng & Lofi Girl)

accessibilityData.label: Play Journey Through Time 🏮 Ancient China [lofi beats to celebrate Chinese New Year] (feat. Jacko Cheng & Lofi Girl)
Pause Journey Through Time 🏮 Ancient China [lofi beats to celebrate Chinese New Year] (feat. Jacko Cheng & Lofi Girl)

runs.text:
Start the Chinese New Year with calming lofi, where timeless traditions meet modern beats.

Travel through the dynasties with tranquil lofi, honoring centuries of Chinese musical tradition and bridging generations and worlds. Delicate pipa plucks and the expressive erhu blend with modern beats, creating a calm, relaxing space for study, deep focus, and reflection. Perfect for welcoming the Lunar New Year, celebrating heritage, and inviting prosperity and happiness.

🎼 | Listen on Spotify, Apple music and more
→  https://lofigirl.fanlink.tv/ancient-china

💿 | Shop the limited Ancient China Vinyl 
→ https://link.lofigirlshop.com/ancient-china-vinyl

🖼️ | Shop the limited Ancient China Print
→ https://link.lofigirlshop.com/ancient-china-print

runs.text:
Join Tiago on his journey home after a day serving drinks on Rio’s sun-soaked beaches. Feel the smooth bossa nova vibes blend with chill summer lofi beats, capturing the easygoing spirit of summer: perfect for unwinding, hanging out, or just soaking it all in.

4 A.M Chill Session 🌌 synthwave music for long gaming nights

accessibilityData.label: Play 4 A.M Chill Session 🌌 synthwave music for long gaming nights
Pause 4 A.M Chill Session 🌌 synthwave music for long gaming nights

runs.text:
Inside his quiet, neon-lit room after midnight, the night settles in shades of blue and violet. Screens glow softly, shelves sit lined with dormant consoles, and the outside world feels distant beyond dark windows and sleeping streets. Settle into the stillness, let your thoughts slow, and relax as warm synths fill the space. 
This early-morning synthwave compilation blends dreamy melodies and relaxed electronic rhythms, creating a nostalgic, intimate atmosphere that keeps you grounded, reflective, and immersed as the hours fade toward morning
